mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.group_name AS groupName, g.group_type AS groupType, g.icon, COALESCE(COUNT(f.id), 0) AS fileCount FROM sys_file_group g LEFT JOIN sys_file_metadata f ON g.id = f.group_id AND f.tenant_id = g.tenant_id AND f.status = 1 WHERE g.deleted = 0 AND g.status = 1 GROUP BY g.id, g.group_name, g.group_type, g.icon ORDER BY g.sort

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN f.mime_type LIKE 'image/%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS imageCount, SUM(CASE WHEN f.mime_type LIKE 'application/%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS documentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN f.mime_type LIKE 'video/%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS videoCount, SUM(CASE WHEN f.mime_type LIKE 'audio/%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS audioCount FROM sys_file_metadata f WHERE f.status = 1
